blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,232 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
